reviews.review_description: Set up was a nightmare. Simulations are very choppy and unless you know what to expect you have no idea what or where to do all the required simulation items. It’s like they are gaslighting you then come back with…. You didn’t do this hidden thing we didn’t tell you you needed to do…. Shame on you for not knowing you needed to do it! I’m sure they’re sitting back laughing about! Missed that one hahaha!
I have new meta quest 2 Xbox edition. The controllers is not working in the menu of this app, so I can't agree to the terms and to use the app. That's really disappointing. Please fix it

I have to use this for school. I think it could be much better. Freezes on the headset and won't let you advance. Has caused me some stress in completing my assignments due to the freezing issue and having to start assignments over multiple times.
My pointer doesn't work 😕. The system goes off without notice
Really well designed. Feels like clinical but safer. Super helpful for nursing. Boosts confidence and meets me where I am.
There is nothing to do in this game. Something or someone is doing all the work.
This game couldn't get anyworse tbh its really underwhelming for the people that want the type of experience its advertising.
I couldn’t see my hands and I had to sign in it was so bad
You literally cant even see your controllers would give 0 but i cant

I can barely even see my own hands

I

reviews.review_title: I would give a no stars if I could
reviews.review_description: Downloaded the app opened it couldn't play without an account contacted the school via email to ask how to access this app, was told u have to be a student. App is garbage unless u become a student don't wait ur time
I couldn’t play

It’s so hard to make games/ experiences! And then to publish them and when it’s your first one on your first day it doesn’t matter if it fails because you didn’t you passed thanks for even trying to do this and power to you! Thanks.

The demo scenario is really awesome. You need to assess patient, get labs, view results, then figure out what treatments they need. Youre given 15 minutes to do it or else they crash. Really fun. Only gave 4 stars because you only get 1 demo. Unless you are part of a university or hospital that has contracted with this company, you wont get anymore. There is no option to purchase as an individual.

Do I even need to say it? The screen controls are atrocious, why do I need to select items with my face? Im spending more time just trying to navigate the screen that I can’t even focus on what it is that I’m doing. Performing patient care is a torturous endeavor with this, it has no resemblance to what it is like in the real world. If I could rate it zero stars I would. Absolutely awful.

reviews.review_title: Don’t even know how to do an account
reviews.review_description: Like this app looks rubbish anyway but it’s just awful don’t even know how to do an account but why do I need to select stuff with my face,why not let me do it with my hands or controllers it’s very laggy sometimes defiantly do not recommend
Why do you make the game public, if you can't even play It. I mean, you can make the game private. So people dont lose time downloading a non-playable game.
Great foundation. Needs hand tracking etc but looks very promising. Urgent care doctor.
The app freezes when you click into certain areas of the simulation. Very frustrating bc I have to restart over and over and not click the part I need bc it will freeze so I get marked down.

reviews.review_title: wouldn't let me play or use demo
reviews.review_description: Even though it offers a guest login, it failed every single time. I tried through the OMS website, but they wouldnt allow individual license so unless you're a medicine person or belong to an institution, you dont have access sadly...
Doesn’t let me play

reviews.review_title: It would not let me play
reviews.review_description: Bad game because I couldn’t play
It doesn't work when I try to play
Won’t let me play so one star

reviews.review_title: i’m not doing all that just to play💀

reviews.review_description: As a physician, honestly wasn’t expecting much but this was surprisingly well done.  I get that this is just a sample for the commercial product which I’ll never have access to, but I suppose if anybody wants an idealized version of the day to day life of a hospital doctor, this is a great app.  Now add 20x the patients, their families, hospital administration pressure, various real life inefficiencies and frustrations and you’ll be doing the real thing! :p
Better app for medical students
